heroes.name: Deathwing
notes: Incinerate cooldown increased from 6s to 7s.
Death Drop Spell Armor duration reduced from 6s to 4s.

heroes.name: Muradin
notes: Storm Bolt quest requirements reduced (50/200 → 40/160).
Give 'Em The Axe bonus damage reduced from 50% to 40%.
Sledgehammer now also reduces Storm Bolt cooldown by 1.5s.
Perfect Storm now restores 25 Mana on reset, internal cooldown reduced.
Healing Static heal per Hero hit increased from 5% to 6%.

heroes.name: Murky
notes: Revive Shield duration increased from 10s to 15s.
March of the Murlocs cooldown reduced from 110s to 100s.
Egg Shell shield now lasts until destroyed and increased from 35% to 50%.
Never-Ending March now lasts a minimum of 7 seconds.

heroes.name: Sylvanas
notes: Lost Soul extra 10% damage bonus removed.

heroes.name: Tyrande
notes: Lunar Flare Mythic reward requirements reduced from 45 to 40 Hero hits.
Samurai Sentinel camp now shows Bruiser icon.
Terrain rendering fix.

heroes.name: Azmodan
notes: Battleborn now properly reduces Demon Lieutenant cooldown.
Black Pool now deals reduced damage to non-Heroes.

heroes.name: Deathwing
notes: AI can no longer use the removed Form Swap ability.

heroes.name: Gul'dan
notes: Ruinous Affliction now correctly triggers on 3rd and 6th hit.

heroes.name: Jaina
notes: Ice Cold no longer allows moving through pathing blockers.
Ice Block tooltip now shows correct cooldown.

heroes.name: Muradin
notes: Dwarf Toss no longer goes on cooldown on invalid terrain.
Dwarf Block can no longer stack beyond 3 charges.

heroes.name: Murky
notes: Fixed losing increased size after death.
Fixed respawning faster than intended.
Shell Game and Faster Fish UI fixes.

heroes.name: Rehgar
notes: Elemental Conduit shield refresh now correctly searches around Rehgar and properly refreshes to 5 seconds.

heroes.name: Thrall
notes: Echo of the Elements no longer bounces to cloaked targets.
Rolling Thunder and Alpha Wolf damage now display as crits.

heroes.name: Zagara
notes: Roaches now display correctly in death recap and use melee attacks instead of missiles.
